awesomeListMeta.descriptionHTML: A collaborative list of great resources about RESTful API architecture, development, test, and performance

nodes.itemHTML: • The Cat API - Public API for Cats Images, Facts and Jokes.

• openapi-generatorstars13.7k - OpenAPI Generator allows generation of API client libraries (SDK generation), server stubs, documentation and configuration automatically given an OpenAPI Spec (v2, v3).
• Google Cloud API design guide - Guidelines Google follows when designing Cloud APIs and other Google APIs (REST APIs and gRPC APIs).
• Haufe API Style Guidestars186 - Guidelines created by Haufe-Lexware CTO team.
• Adidas REST API Guidelines - Adidas REST API Guidelines define standards and guidelines for building REST APIs at adidas.
• Atlassian REST API design guidelines version 1 - This document provides guidelines to Atlassian developers who are designing REST APIs for Atlassian applications.
• Cisco REST API Guidestars87 - Guidelines for designing REST APIs at Cisco.
• Microsoft REST API Guidelines - The Microsoft REST API Guidelines, as a design principle, encourages application developers to have resources accessible to them via a RESTful HTTP interface.
• Restful API Guidelines by Zalandostars1.8k - Developing Restful APIs: A Comprehensive Set of Guidelines.
• Nangostars28 - Native integrations framework to consume REST APIs (open-source).
• Schemathesisstars1.5k - Property-based testing tool for web applications built with Open API and GraphQL specifications.
• MockServer - Easy mocking of any system you integrate with via HTTP or HTTPS.
• Mockintosh - A mock server generator that's capable to generate RESTful APIs and communicate with the message queues to mimick asynchronous tasks.
• Opticstars1k - Maintain an accurate API specification without writing OpenAPI/Swagger. Works with any Stack
• Mockoon - Easily create mock APIs locally. No remote deployment, no account required, open source.
• WSO2 API Managementstars643 - API management tool with lightweight gateway and API lifecycle management, written in Java.
• Milkmanstars844 - Extensible cross-platform request/response workbench, not only for http calls.
• KrakenDstars5.3k Ultra performant API Gateway with middleware. Written in Go.
• ExtendsClass - Make HTTP requests with a simple web-based HTTP client.
• TestMace - Cross-platform simple but powerful IDE for API automation testing.
• Chaosstars250 - A lightweight framework for writing REST services in Scala.

• FastAPIstars50.5k - FastAPI is a modern, fast (high-performance), web framework for building APIs with Python 3.6+ based on standard Python type hints. With automatic API documentation using Swagger UI and ReDoc, based on OpenAPI and JSON Schema.
• Nestjsx/crudstars3.2k - Generate CRUD controllers and services for RESTful API with NestJS and TypeORM.
• react-adminstars20.8k - Add a ReactJS admin GUI to any RESTful API.
• Express Gatewaystars2.7k - Microservices API Gateway built on top of ExpressJS (Node.js).
• RequestBin - Inspect and debug webhook requests sent by your clients or third-party APIs.
• HTTP Promptstars8.6k - HTTP Prompt is an interactive command-line HTTP client featuring autocomplete and syntax highlighting, built on HTTPie and prompt_toolkit.
• Insomniastars24k - Cross-platform HTTP and GraphQL Client
• Beeceptor - An HTTP inspecting, mocking and proxing service. Gives named endpoints for creating mock API endpoints and simulate responses.
• Falconstars8.9k - Falcon is a bare-metal Python web API framework for building high-performance microservices, app backends, and higher-level frameworks.
• rest-hapistars1.2k - Generate RESTful API based on mongoose models that supports relational data.
• pRESTstars3.4k - A fully RESTful API from any existing PostgreSQL database written in Go.
• DuckRailsstars1.7k - Mock quickly & dynamically API endpoints.
• Slatestars34.6k - Beautiful and responsive three-panel API documentation using Middleman.
• Moesif - API Analytics for Debugging, Monitoring, and Usage Tracking for RESTful and GraphQL.
• 3scale - Nginx based API gateway to integrate internal and external API services with 3scale's API Management Platform.
• Kongstars33.1k - Scalable, distributed, and plugin oriented API gateway backed by Nginx.
• Tyk API Gatewaystars7.8k - Lightweight API gateway with analytics logging, written in Go.
• API Umbrellastars1.8k - API management platform for exposing web services, with web interface and analytics, written in Lua.
• Grape - Opinionated micro-framework for creating REST-like APIs in Ruby.
• Rails - RailsGuides: Using Rails for API-only applications.
• Dropwizardstars8.3k - A framework for developing ops-friendly, high-performance, RESTful web services.
• apistarstars5.6k - A smart Web API framework, designed for Python 3.
• hug - Lightweight and fast API Framework.
• swagger-codegenstars14.9k - Auto generation of client libraries or server stubs given an OpenAPI specification (formerly known as the Swagger Specification).
• Expressastars397 - Express middleware for creating APIs from JSON schemas with a simple admin editor and permissions model.
• Assertible - Continuously test and monitor your APIs after deployments and across environments.
• Request Basketsstars182 - Service to collect HTTP requests and inspect them via RESTful API or web UI.
• Lumberstars2.1k - Generate the admin interface of your application.
• rest-assuredstars6.1k - Java DSL for easy testing of REST services.
• Vertx-Webstars989 - Vert.x-Web is a set of building blocks for building web applications with Vert.x, a toolkit for building reactive applications on the JVM.
• raml-ruby-client-generatorstars1 - Auto generate API client from a RAML file.
• restystars6.8k - Simple HTTP and REST client for Go inspired by Ruby rest-client.
• Flask-Potionstars490 - Flask-Potion is a powerful Flask extension for building RESTful JSON APIs. It also provides several Clients for easier access to the API.
• Fusiostars1.2k - Open source API management platform.
• ReDocstars18.7k - OpenAPI/Swagger-powered three-panel documentation.
• NelmioApiDocBundlestars2.1k - Generate documentation for your REST API from annotations.
• httpartystars5.6k - Makes HTTP fun again!
• Net::HTTP - Net::HTTP provides a rich library which can be used to build HTTP user-agents.

• Feathers - is a real-time, micro-service web framework that gives you control over your data via RESTful resources, sockets and flexible plug-ins.

• Python Eve - Eve is an open source Python REST API framework designed for human beings. It allows to effortlessly build and deploy highly customizable, fully featured RESTful Web Services.
• JSON API - Standard for building APIs in JSON.
• RAML - Simple and succinct way to describe RESTful API.
• JSend - Simple specification that lays down some rules for how JSON responses from web servers should be formatted.
• OData - Open protocol to allow the creation and consumption of queryable and interoperable RESTful APIs. Quite complex.
• JSON-LD - Standard for describing Linked Data and hypermedia relations in JSON (W3C).
• Hydra - Vocabulary for Hypermedia-Driven Web APIs (W3C).
• Schema.org - Collection of schemas describing common data models.

• Negotiationstars1.3k - Content negotiation library.

• go-json-reststars3.5k - Thin layer on top of net/http that helps building RESTful APIs easily.

• go-relaxstars153 - Framework of pluggable components to build RESTful API's.
